hyperedges.label: Static Asset Migration Pipeline (Supabase → Repo → Vercel)
VSA AI Agent Roster (Claude + Codex Playbooks)
Yearly Leaderboard Data Flow (attendance → terms → view → UI)

nodes.label: is_published Filter Pattern
nodes.rationale: Public event pages must only show events with is_published=true; admin pages must read all including drafts. Failure to enforce this exposes draft content publicly.

nodes.label: Archive Year Scoping Rule
nodes.rationale: Archive routes must be strictly scoped to their year; current-year fallback data must never appear on archive year routes, and invalid slugs must not resolve to current year.

nodes.label: Supabase Storage as Staging Buffer
nodes.rationale: Admin uploads go to Supabase Storage first because browsers cannot write to Vercel /public directory directly. Migration workflow graduates images into the repo static asset tree, reducing Supabase egress.

nodes.label: Query-First Workflow Rule
nodes.rationale: Run graphify query/path before reading source files to reduce noise and token usage. Source files are opened only after the graph confirms relevance.

nodes.label: academic_term_id Assignment Requirement
nodes.rationale: Events MUST have an academic_term_id to be counted in yearly totals; without one, points only appear in the All-Time view.

nodes.label: VSA Admin Editorial Design System (Stitch Prompts)
nodes.norm_label: vsa admin editorial design system (stitch prompts)

nodes.label: Repository Layer Mandate
nodes.rationale: All Supabase queries must go through src/data/repos/ repository singletons. Never call supabase directly from a component or page, and never create a new Supabase client instance.
